user_story: As an Employee, I want to select a financial year on the My Salary Details screen, so that I can view my salary breakdown for that period.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Salary Details screen; When I choose a financial year; Then the salary details are shown for that period

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my monthly CTC components such as Basic, HRA, allowances and employer contributions, so that I can understand my fixed pay structure.
acceptance_criteria: Given a financial year is selected; When the salary table loads; Then each earning component is shown month by month with a total column

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see my gross salary and gross pay across the year, so that I can reconcile my total earnings.
acceptance_criteria: Given a financial year is selected; When the salary table loads; Then Gross Salary and Gross Pay rows display monthly and total values

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my deductions including PF, ESI, profession tax and standard deduction, so that I can verify what is withheld from my pay.
acceptance_criteria: Given a financial year is selected; When the salary table loads; Then employee PF and ESI contributions, profession tax and standard deduction are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see Gratuity and ESI applicability per month, so that I know which statutory rules apply to my salary.
acceptance_criteria: Given a financial year is selected; When the salary table loads; Then Gratuity Applicability and ESI Cycle Applicability are shown for each month

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view the actual TDS deducted as per my payslip, so that I can confirm the tax withheld against my earnings.
acceptance_criteria: Given a financial year is selected; When the salary table loads; Then the Actual TDS Deducted as per Pay slip row is displayed
